This advisory has been withdrawn because the it only affects a user who runs specifically crafted code that happens to use gradio library. More information can be found [here](https://github.com/gradio-app/gradio/issues/8853).

### Original Description
Gradio v4.36.1 was discovered to contain a code injection vulnerability via the component /gradio/component_meta.py. title: Withdrawn Advisory: Gradio was discovered to contain a code injection vulnerability via the component /gradio/component_meta.py
